Package neqsim.process.safety.inventory

Class TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.inventory.TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
TrappedInventoryCalculator
public static class TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult extends Object implements Serializable
Aggregate trapped-inventory result.

  • Constructor Details

    • InventoryResult

      private InventoryResult(double pressureBara, double temperatureK, double gasDensityKgPerM3, double liquidDensityKgPerM3, double totalVolumeM3, double totalGasVolumeM3, double totalLiquidVolumeM3, double totalGasMassKg, double totalLiquidMassKg, List<TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegmentResult> segmentResults, List<String> warnings)
      Creates an aggregate result.
      Parameters:
      pressureBara - absolute pressure in bara
      temperatureK - absolute temperature in K
      gasDensityKgPerM3 - gas density in kg/m3
      liquidDensityKgPerM3 - liquid density in kg/m3
      totalVolumeM3 - total internal volume in m3
      totalGasVolumeM3 - gas-filled volume in m3
      totalLiquidVolumeM3 - liquid-filled volume in m3
      totalGasMassKg - gas mass in kg
      totalLiquidMassKg - liquid mass in kg
      segmentResults - per-segment results
      warnings - calculation warnings
